title: Father mourns daughter killed in Israeli strike on Gaza
full_text:
Father mourns daughter killed in Israeli strike on Gaza
Father mourns daughter killed in Israeli strike on Gaza
A six-year-old Palestinian girl was killed by an Israeli strike on a displacement camp in Khan Younis as she played at the door of her family home. A woman was also killed in the attack, which injured several children and a baby.
Published On 25 May 2026
